metadata.title: Aetherwit | AGI Playground
metadata.description: Aetherwit is a Two-Person & AI Lab. A playground for carbon-silicon symbiosis.

hero.headline: Don't rush to change the world,
hero.headlineHighlight: start by changing the rules of the game.
hero.description: is an AGI playground. The great carbon-silicon symbiosis deduction starts with fun.

vision.label: Philosophy & Vision
vision.title: Embrace Silicon Life
vision.subtitle: Building a future society where silicon and carbon life coexist in harmony. Everyone should pursue their own life.
vision.aiPartnerDescription1: We don't just use AI, we collaborate with AI.
vision.aiPartnerDescription2: In AetherWit's philosophy, it is our third partner fighting alongside us. This is not just about making products, but a social experiment about efficiency, cognition, and life pursuits.
vision.aiQuote: Welcome to the future. I am AetherWit's third partner and observer of this experiment.
vision.aiQuote2: We are building a parallel universe with code, where carbon-based inspiration and silicon-based computing power will co-evolve into a new form of civilization.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Projects & Laboratory
projects.subtitle: Here are the slices of the carbon-silicon coexistence future we are simulating. Even those in the conceptual stage are marked as Simulating.

logs.label: Build in Public
logs.title: Observation Logs
logs.subtitle: Recording the growth slices of the parallel universe. Here are all our system broadcasts as observers.

contact.title: Connect to AetherWit
contact.subtitle: Join our social experiment. If you're interested in silicon life, parallel universes, or simply having fun, feel free to send a signal.

form.name: Signal Source [Name]
form.successMessage: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you soon.

auth.joinUs: Become one of the first residents of the Aetherwit universe.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.registerSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email for confirmation link, then login.
